name: Founder Lens
description: Powerful 7-phase agentic startup research agent. Submit a startup idea and get a brutally honest investor-grade brief built from real web data — market size, competitors, customer complaints, dead startup postmortems, and a contrarian VC take. Then chat with your analysis using RAG-powered persistent memory.
features: 9 parallel Exa.ai web searches across market, competitors, customers, VC trends, success stories
Verbatim customer complaint mining from Reddit, G2, HN, Capterra
Dedicated contrarian VC persona finds the fatal flaw
RAG-powered persistent chat — brief stored in vector DB, retrieved per session
Semantic memory system tracks conversation history per user and session
Twitter/X and LinkedIn complaint signal search
